title: Thai Oxtail Braised Stew
description: A rich and zesty Thai-inspired oxtail stew made with braised oxtail and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the oxtail in batches, about 5 minutes per batch.
Remove the browned oxtail from the pot and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and cook the onion until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the curry paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the fish sauce and sugar and stir to combine.
Add the browned oxtail back to the pot and pour in the broth.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Braise for 2 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Stir in the coconut milk and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with Thai basil.
